name: realtor-jarvis
description: The Agent Leverage OS — a real estate agent's AI admin. Books the calendar (conflict-checked, guests invited, video link attached), drafts email in the agent's voice, sorts the inbox every morning, remembers every client, and delivers a 7am briefing. REQUIRES the Realtor AI Brain plugin (same marketplace): install it and run 'Set up my Brain' first — Jarvis reads everything from the Brain and never re-interviews the agent.
